# testing — ios-talenta

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `mapper_test` | Test that Response DTOs are correctly converted to Domain Models. |
| `presenter_test` | ViewModel unit tests using mocked use cases — verify state transitions and output bindings. |
| `repository_test` | Test that RepositoryImpl correctly bridges DataSource results to Domain completions. |
| `test_pyramid` | Layer-based test pyramid: Unit at the base, Integration in the middle, UI tests minimal. |
| `procedure` | Step-by-step test writing procedure for this platform |
